data.title: Carrier Global Corp conducts commercial field trials for rooftop heat pumps. Shows efficiency gains and lower costs.
data.description: Cutting-edge systems have showcased their ability to excel in cold climates, leading to increased efficiency and reduced operational expenses for business structures in Charlotte, N.C. On December 23, 2025, Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), a prominent provider of smart climate and energy solutions worldwide, revealed...

data.title: Recon Labs to debut GenPresso AI design agent platform at CES 2026 in Las Vegas, revolutionizing workflow. #AI #CES2026
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 23, 2025, Recon Labs Inc., a prominent company specializing in AI-powered 3D content and creative technology, revealed its plan to launch the AI design agent platform, GenPresso, worldwide at CES 2026 in Las Vegas. This unveiling marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to showcase its innovative technology on a global stage.

data.title: Farmer Marilyn Backman and her world-famous pies are lifting up her community, featured in Pivot Bio's series.
data.description: Pivot Bio's series "Pivotal People Inspired by Real Farm Heroes" shines a light on Marilyn Backman, renowned for her world-famous pies. This entrepreneurial farmer, involved in her family's seed business, also serves as a respected advocate. The series is a tribute to individuals like Marilyn who are making a significant impact in the agricultural sector.

data.title: Brand Safety Summit Series expands to Dubai with Channel Factory as initial title partner. Middle East debut on Jan 29, 2026, at Atlantis The Royal Dubai.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, the global platform will have its inaugural event in the Middle East at Atlantis The Royal Dubai. The Brand Safety Summit Series, organized by The 614 Group, now also including AI Safety, shared this news on December 23, 2025.

data.title: Velotric partners with Conte's Bike Shop to expand ebike access in the U.S., serving over 150,000 riders.
data.description: Velotric, a leading Ebike brand with a strong following of more than 150,000 riders in North America, has revealed a new collaboration with Conte Bikes. This partnership will make Velotric's entire range of Ebikes accessible through Conte Bikes' distribution channels. The announcement was made in Palo Alto, California on December 23, 2025. This move is anticipated to increase the availability of Velotric Ebikes and expand their reach within the biking community.

data.title: SLB wins 5-yr contract with Aramco to boost Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas production growth.
data.description: A global technology company, SLB (NYSE: SLB), has recently secured a five-year contract from Aramco for providing stimulation services to its unconventional gas fields. This contract is a component of a larger multi-billion agreement that backs one of the leading unconventional gas development ventures internationally. The deal encompasses various services like advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions. These services are crucial in exploiting Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas potential.

data.title: Milliman wins CMS chili cook-off with AI fraud solution, enhancing program integrity. #FraudDetection #PublicSector
data.description: A company based in Seattle, Milliman, Inc., was recently named the winner of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) "Crushing Fraud Chili Cook-Off" Competition. Their success demonstrates their innovative use of explainable artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance public sector program integrity by improving fraud, waste, and abuse (FWA) analytics. Milliman's award-winning solution was selected for its effectiveness in providing practical insights and stood out among competitors in the field. This achievement showcases their dedication to combating fraudulent activities within public healthcare programs.
Upexi submits Form S-3 with SEC for shelf registration.

data.title: Nuvve partners with E&B Renewables for Battery Energy Storage in Europe. MoU includes deployment of BESS projects.
data.description: In Denmark, Nuvve Denmark ApS, a subsidiary of Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE), a renowned figure in managing distributed grid assets and vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology, has partnered with E&B Renewables ApS, a Danish company specializing in renewable energy ventures. The two companies have recently signed a Non-Binding Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) aimed at deploying Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) across Europe. This agreement sets the groundwork for cooperation, beginning with three initial projects.

data.title: CDT Environmental Technology releases 2025 unaudited financials and business updates.
data.description: CDT Environmental Technology has released its unaudited interim financial results for 2025, showing a revenue increase of 15% compared to the same period last year, totaling $20 million. The company also reported a net profit of $3.5 million, reflecting a growth of 10%. Additionally, CDT Environmental Technology provided updates on its business operations, highlighting successful new product launches and expanding market presence. These results indicate a positive outlook for the company as it continues to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: MouthWatch honors winners of 8th Annual Teledentistry Innovation Awards, 'The Tellies', in 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Metuchen, New Jersey, MouthWatch, Inc., a prominent company in teledentistry solutions and digital imaging, revealed the winners of the 8th Annual Teledentistry Innovation Awards. These awards, dubbed "The Tellies," are highly recognized in the dental field for highlighting innovation and excellence in teledentistry practices. The event honored leaders and organizations making significant advancements in the field. This year's recipients joined the esteemed list of past winners and contributed to the ongoing growth and success of teledentistry.

data.title: NYSE reports S&P 500 off third-winning session. Pre-market updates available for market insights. Ashley Mastronardi delivers news, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in New York City, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued its daily pre-market report, originating from the NYSE Trading Floor. The update, presented by Ashley Mastronardi, offers valuable market insights ahead of the trading day. Investors can gain key information to inform their trades as they prepare for the market opening. This timely preview aids in making informed decisions based on the latest market trends and developments. Stay ahead of the curve with the NYSE Pre-market update.

data.title: Mutare Inc. partners with Webex by Cisco to launch Mutare Voice Traffic Score (VTS) for real-time call reputation intelligence.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Mutare Inc., an expert in Voice Security, revealed a collaboration with Webex by Cisco, a top provider of collaboration technologies. This partnership aims to introduce Mutare Voice Traffic Score (VTS), a groundbreaking solution designed to enhance voice communication security.

data.title: Robles BioCeutics reveals breakthrough skin care method in activating stem cells for age reversal.
data.description: A new technique for reversing the effects of aging on the skin has been developed by Robles BioCeutics in San Diego, California. This method involves stimulating the existing stem cells within the skin to achieve a "time reversal" effect. This regenerative dermatology company is utilizing senolytic science and stem cell research to create advanced skincare solutions. The breakthrough was announced on December 23, 2025, showcasing a novel approach toward rejuvenating the skin. By activating the stem cells already present in the skin, this innovative technique offers a promising strategy for combating aging effects.

data.title: Thomas Ruggie discusses direct investment opportunities in AI revolution in Forbes, Dec23, 2025. Transformative tech shaping the future.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, as of December 23, 2025, direct investment opportunities are playing a significant role in fueling the ongoing artificial intelligence revolution. A recent article featured on Forbes.com highlights how these opportunities are reshaping access to one of the most revolutionary technologies of our era. This development underscores the growing importance of investing in AI, with potential to drive innovation and change the technological landscape.

data.title: SelectCam AI launches AI-powered video telematics solutions for fleet safety in China with M8 8-channel AI-powered 4G MDVR and DC20 6-channel dashcam.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, a technology company named SelectCam AI introduced its new AI video telematics solutions. The company unveiled the M8, an 8-channel AI-powered 4G MDVR, and the DC20, a 6-channel AI-powered 4G dashcam. These cutting-edge devices are specifically designed for freight fleets, aiming to enhance safety and operational efficiency through advanced AI video telematics. SelectCam AI stands out from conventional hardware manufacturers by emphasizing its product-oriented approach to technological innovation.
